state_invariants: completed_leaf_ids and remaining_leaf_ids must be disjoint
every referenced leaf id must exist in leaves
active_gate may be none only when remaining_leaf_ids and pending_gate_ids are empty
later-proof tests must permit later valid states or be retired/replaced during closeout
